zh.Henestrosa de las Quintanillas, Valdeole: 西班牙桑坦德瓦爾德奧列亞亨斯特洛薩 德 拉斯 昆塔尼利亞斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mayor de Sandoval y Rada於1172年出生在西班牙時，她的父親Gutierre Diaz  de Sandoval27歲，母親Ines de Rada25歲。她於大約1192年與Martin Ruiz de Henestrosa在西班牙結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1194年在她的家鄉享年22歲。

zh-hans.Henestrosa de las Quintanillas, Valdeole: 西班牙桑坦德瓦爾德奧列亞亨斯特洛薩 德 拉斯 昆塔尼利亞斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mayor de Sandoval y Rada于1172年出生在西班牙时，她的父亲Gutierre Diaz  de Sandoval27岁，母亲Ines de Rada25岁。她于大约1192年与Martin Ruiz de Henestrosa在西班牙结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1194年在她的家乡享年22岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rada
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Delfin, Ernesto, Jose, Lilia, Adelardo, Alipio, Arquimedes, Arturo, Cesar, Cruz, Eladia.

Czech and Slovak: from a short form of any of various Slavic personal names containing the element rad ‘merry, glad’ (from Old Slavic radъ), such as Radoslav, in which the second element means ‘glory’ or ‘famous’.
Hungarian: from the old personal name Rada or Ráda, of Slavic origin (see 1 above and Rad ).

variants.name: Rach
meanings: German: from Middle High German rach ‘rough, stiff’, a nickname for someone affected by hard work, or a topographic name from the same word in the sense ‘steep, rough’.
Czech, Polish, and Sorbian: from a pet form of the personal names beginning with Ra-, especially Slavic names such as Czech Radoslav, Polish and Sorbian Radosław (see Rada ).

variants.name: Radach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Christoph, Otto, Waltraut.
German: from a short form of any of various Slavic personal names based on Old Slavic radъ ‘merry, glad’ (see Rada 1).
Americanized form of Czech Radáč: from a pet form of a personal name containing the Slavic element rad ‘merry, glad’ (see Rada 1).

variants.name: Rad
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Ali, Bijan, Abbas, Amad, Masoud, Nader, Nasser, Saeed, Ahmad, Alireza, Amir, Azin.

Iranian: from Persian rād ‘bold, brave’, also ‘skilful, learned’, forming the second part (originally a suffix) of compound names such as Mahdavirad or Mahdavi Rad (see Mahdavi ). The surname may also be from the personal name Rād, based on the same word. Compare Raad 2.
German: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with rād, rāt ‘advice, counsel’.

variants.name: Radack
meanings: German: from a Germanized pet form of any of various Slavic personal names based on Old Slavic radъ ‘merry, glad’ (see Rada 1, compare Radak ).
Americanized form of Serbian and Croatian   Radak  .

History: The progenitor of many of the American Radacks was Ephraim Radack, a German from Alt Danzig in the Russian Empire (today Karlivka in Ukraine), a settlement founded by the colonists from Danzig in Prussia (today Gdansk in Poland). He and his family immigrated to SD in the 1870s.

nameMeanings.name: Sandoval
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Jesus, Carlos, Manuel, Luis, Francisco, Ruben, Pedro, Miguel, Raul, Mario.

Spanish: habitational name from any of the places called Sandoval, in particular the one in Burgos, also those in Murcia and Málaga, earlier called Sannoval, from Latin saltus ‘grove’, ‘wood’ + novalis ‘newly cleared land’. In the US, this surname is also found among Native Americans (Navajos).

en.lifeSummary: When Mayor de Sandoval y Rada was born in 1172, in Spain, her father, Gutierre Diaz  de Sandoval, was 27 and her mother, Ines de Rada, was 25. She married Martin Ruiz de Henestrosa about 1192, in Spain. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1194, in her hometown, at the age of 22.

fr.Henestrosa de las Quintanillas, Valdeole: Henestrosa de las Quintanillas, Valdeolea, Santander, Espagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mayor de Sandoval y Rada est née en 1172, à Espagne, son père, Gutierre Diaz  de Sandoval, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Ines de Rada, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Martin Ruiz de Henestrosa environ 1192, à Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1194, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 22 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mayor de Sandoval y Rada 1172 in Spanien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gutierre Diaz  de Sandoval 27 und ihre Mutter Ines de Rada 25. Sie hat um 1192 in Spanien Martin Ruiz de Henestrosa geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1194 im Alter von 22 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mayor de Sandoval y Rada è nata il nel 1172 nel Spagna, sua padre, Gutierre Diaz  de Sandoval, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Ines de Rada, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Martin Ruiz de Henestrosa circa 1192, nel Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1194, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 22 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mayor de Sandoval y Radaが1172年にスペインで生まれた時，父Gutierre Diaz  de Sandovalは27歳，母Ines de Radaは25歳であった。約1192年にスペインでMartin Ruiz de Henestrosaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1194年に故郷で22歳で死去した。

ko.Henestrosa de las Quintanillas, Valdeole: 스페인 산탠더 발데오리 헨스트로자 데 라스 퀸탠이라스
ko.lifeSummary: Mayor de Sandoval y Rada(이)가 1172년 스페인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gutierre Diaz  de Sandoval(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ines de Rada(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1192년 스페인에서 Martin Ruiz de Henestrosa(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1194년 그녀의 고향에서 22세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Henestrosa de las Quintanillas, Valdeole: хинестроса де лас куинтаниллас, валдеолеа, сантандир, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mayor de Sandoval y Rada родилась в 1172 г. в местности Испания, её отцу по имени Gutierre Diaz  de Sandoval было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Ines de Rada, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Martin Ruiz de Henestrosa около 1192 г. в местности Испания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1194 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 22 лет.
